creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mateusz Piotrowski from comment #2)

With my usual /etc/src.conf I get this: 

===>  Building for virtualbox-ose-kmod-6.1.36
cd /tmp/mountpoint.bDKJiv/emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod/work/VirtualBox-6.1.36/src/VBox/HostDrivers && /bin/sh -c  '. /tmp/mountpoint.bDKJiv/emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod/work/VirtualBox-6.1.36/env.sh && VBOX_LIBPATH_X11=/usr/local VBOX_FREEBSD_SRC=/usr/src/sys /usr/local/bin/kmk HostDrivers-scripts vboxdrv-src VBoxNetFlt-src VBoxNetAdp-src'
cd: /tmp/mountpoint.bDKJiv/emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod/work/VirtualBox-6.1.36/src/VBox/HostDrivers: No such file or directory
*** Error code 2

Stop.
